description: Scores investors by likelihood to transact (buy or sell) and value of the agent relationship. Optimized for agents who want to represent investors in acquisitions, dispositions, or both.

no_homestead.description: Confirms investment property, not primary residence

value_150k_500k.description: Core investment range — high transaction volume

value_500k_1m.description: Premium investment — higher commission per deal

multi_family.description: Multi-family 2-4 units — complex deal, higher value, repeat buyer

new_construction.description: Built within last 3 years — possible builder/developer, high deal flow

high_land_ratio.description: Land value >60% of total — tear-down/development potential

absentee_out_of_state.description: Out-of-state investor — NEEDS local agent representation for acquisitions, management, dispositions

absentee_in_state.description: In-state but not local — may need local market agent

portfolio_10_plus.description: Serial investor — highest relationship value, repeat buyer/seller, multi-market

portfolio_5_to_9.description: Established portfolio — proven buyer, likely to transact again

portfolio_2_to_4.description: Growing investor — actively building, next purchase imminent

multi_city.description: Properties in 3+ cities — needs agents in multiple markets, referral opportunity

recent_purchase_0_6mo.description: Purchased within last 6 months — ACTIVELY buying right now

recent_purchase_6_12mo.description: Purchased within last 12 months — active buyer

recent_purchase_12_24mo.description: Purchased 12-24 months ago — may be ready for next acquisition

high_velocity.description: 2+ acquisitions in last 24 months — high-frequency buyer

cash_buyer.description: Pays cash — fast close, no financing contingency, agent dream client

long_hold_large_portfolio.description: 5+ years hold with 5+ properties — may be ready to sell/1031 exchange

active_permits.description: Recent building permits — active developer/rehabber, high deal flow

high_permit_value.description: Permit value >$100K — serious construction/renovation, developer profile

reo_purchase.description: Bought REO/foreclosure — value investor, bargain hunter, wants off-market deals

high_rent_yield.description: Gross yield >7% — income-focused investor, will buy more yield plays

adjacent_properties.description: Owns adjacent parcels — possible development/assembly play

tier_1.label: Priority
tier_1.action: Immediate outreach — phone + personalized email with portfolio reference

tier_2.label: Opportunity
tier_2.action: Targeted email sequence with market insights for their areas

tier_3.label: Watch List
tier_3.action: Add to market report drip — nurture until next transaction signal

descriptions.Serial Acquirer (10+): 10+ properties, consistent buying pattern — highest lifetime value relationship
descriptions.Active Developer: Recent permits, new construction, high permit value — needs off-market land and distressed properties
descriptions.Out-of-State Investor: Absentee owner buying remotely — needs local agent for eyes on ground
descriptions.High-Velocity Buyer: 2+ purchases in 24 months — timing is everything, likely buying again soon
descriptions.Portfolio Builder (5-9): Established and growing — proven buyer, clear pattern to target
descriptions.Cash Buyer: Pays cash, fast close — most attractive buyer type for sellers
descriptions.Growing Investor (2-4): Early stage, actively building — next purchase is the relationship starter
descriptions.Value Investor: Buys REO/distressed, high yield focus — wants off-market deal flow
descriptions.Long-Hold / Disposition Candidate: 5+ year holds, large portfolio — may be ready to sell or 1031 exchange
descriptions.General Investor: Investment property owner with basic signals
